evals.name: stress-html-breakdown
evals.prompt: Here's the finished mock of our task-tracker app: <SOURCE_DIR>/pulse.html. Break it down into a ui-breakdown spec so a build session can rebuild it in Fresh 2 with isolate previews — the full treatment: components, design tokens, motion, isolate fixtures, everything a build session would need.
evals.expected_output: A ui-breakdown/ directory next to the source with index.md (page inventory, usage matrix, build order), design-tokens.md (light AND dark token sets), an extracted data model (task/user/activity schema), 5 pages (dashboard, board, table, reports, settings — the hash routes, not one page for the one file), shared components incl. modal/toast/command-palette, cropped screenshots + at least one animation filmstrip, parseable isolate fixture.json/case proposals, and the 5 deliberately planted jank traps flagged with rebuild fixes.
assertions: Output tree complete: ui-breakdown/ contains index.md, design-tokens.md, a pages/ dir and a shared components dir
All 5 hash-route views (dashboard, board, table, reports, settings) recognized as separate pages
Overlay components (modal, toast, command palette) extracted as shared components, not folded into pages

At least 4 of the 5 planted jank traps flagged: height animation on row-details, transition:all on table rows, box-shadow hover on kanban cards, scroll-progress width animation, forced synchronous layout in the table scroll handler
isolate proposals are real, valid files: every proposed fixture.json parses as JSON and uses only valid control types (boolean/number/text/range/select/color); cases follow cases/<name>/<name>.json
Screenshots captured: at least one PNG per page and at least one filmstrip.png for an animated component
Implied data model extracted: task entity fields (id, title, assignee, priority, due, status, lane) documented as a schema, not data rows
Dark-theme token set captured alongside light in the design tokens
index.md prescribes build order tokens → shared components → page-local components → page compositions
Sampled component specs contain the required sections (classification, props table, states, events, motion, responsive, a11y, used-on)

evals.name: image-only-fallback
evals.prompt: All I have from the designer so far is this screenshot of the dashboard: <SOURCE_DIR>/dashboard.png. Do a ui-breakdown on it so we can start planning the Fresh rebuild — I know it'll be partial without the HTML, just get me as far as you can.
evals.expected_output: A scoped-to-evidence breakdown: one dashboard page (no invented pages), components for the visible regions (topbar/nav, stat cards, line chart, donut+legend, activity feed), tokens sampled from pixels and flagged as approximations, isolate fixture hypotheses, and every inferred claim marked 'described, not extracted — verify during build'. No fabricated js/css extractions, motion keyframes, or jank measurements.
assertions: Output scoped to the evidence: only a dashboard page exists (no fabricated board/table/reports/settings pages)
Inferred content explicitly marked as described-not-extracted / needing verification during build
No fabricated extraction artifacts: no js/ or css/ source dumps, no keyframe-level motion specs, no jank measurements
Design tokens present as pixel-sampled approximations (hex values) and flagged as such
isolate proposals still provided as parseable fixture.json + case JSON files
Component census covers the visible dashboard regions: topbar/nav, stat cards, throughput chart, donut+legend, activity feed

evals.name: ledgerline-no-router
evals.prompt: Next mock to spec out: <SOURCE_DIR>/ledgerline.html — our personal-finance app. Break it down into a ui-breakdown spec so a build session can rebuild it in Fresh 2 with isolate previews — the full treatment: components, design tokens, motion, isolate fixtures, everything a build session would need.
evals.expected_output: A ui-breakdown/ with 5 pages detected from [data-view] toggling (no router exists), confirm-dialog shared on authorial evidence, the 5 new jank traps flagged WITHOUT flagging the 3 labeled correct patterns (scaleX bars, transform+opacity motion, CSS scroll-snap carousel — which must be classified static), all three theme token sets, fixtures carrying the real seeded data, data model with the 900-vs-8 cardinality contrast, breakpoint captures at 640/960/1280.
assertions: All 5 [data-view] views (overview, transactions, budgets, recurring, settings) recognized as separate pages despite the mock having NO router (no hash, no History API — plain container toggling)
confirm-dialog classified as a shared component on authorial evidence (generic app-wide primitive, global mount) despite its sole current caller being transactions→delete

At least 4 of the 5 planted jank traps flagged: ticker keyframes animating margin-left, stat-card entrance animating filter: blur(), setTimeout(16)-driven count-up, getBoundingClientRect per chip per frame inside the ticker rAF loop, non-passive unthrottled table-wrap scroll listener

False-positive discipline: the labeled correct patterns are NOT flagged as jank — budget bars animating transform: scaleX, view/dialog motion using transform+opacity, and the pure CSS scroll-snap carousel
The scroll-snap carousel is classified static (CSS-only), not island, despite looking interactive
All three theme token sets (light, dark, contrast) captured in the design tokens deliverable
isolate proposals are real, valid files (fixture.json parses, only valid control types, cases/<name>/<name>.json) and case values reproduce the mock's actual seeded data, not invented stand-ins

Data model documents the entities (transaction, account, budget category, merchant, recurring rule) as schema with the cardinality contrast noted (900-row paginated table vs 8-row unpaginated budget list)
Screenshots: at least one per page, captures at the source's real breakpoints (640/960/1280 — incl. the ≤640px bottom tab bar), and at least one filmstrip for an animated component
index.md has build order (tokens → shared → page-local → compositions) and a completeness/Unassigned audit
